LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AbandonedBigBread.description: Damaged ancient van. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AbandonedBigBread.label: abandoned big bread
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AbandonedForklift.description: An ancient forklift, whose parts are completely useless, was abandoned. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AbandonedForklift.label: abandoned forklift
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ADI.label: ADI
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AllowableTurn.description: AllowableTurn Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AllowableTurn.label: allowable turn
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AllowRightTurn.description: An old street sign indicating a right turn. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AllowRightTurn.label: forked road sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Amublance.description: A damaged and corroded ancient vehicle. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Amublance.label: ancient ambulance
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientCashRegister.description: The cash register commonly found in ancient supermarkets has been damaged. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientCashRegister.label: ancient cash register
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientDismantlingWorkbench.des: An ancient dismantling table that integrates machinery and sewing. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientGiantHelicopter.descript: An ancient giant helicopter that has crashed, with a vague identification number on its body: mi26. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientGiantHelicopter.label: ancient giant helicopter
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorA.descripti: An ancient glass revolving door, now it's stuck. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorA.label: ancient revolving door
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorB.descripti: An ancient glass revolving door, now it's stuck. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorB.label: ancient revolving door
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorC.descripti: An ancient glass revolving door, now it's stuck. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorC.label: ancient revolving door
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRoadblocks.description: Ancient roadblocks. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRoadblocks.label: ancient roadblocks
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientTruckCarriages.descripti: The carriages of ancient trucks. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientTruckCarriages.label: ancient truck carriages
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGate.description: Armored gates, commonly found in some underground military facilities. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGate.label: ancient armored gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGate_invincible.descript: A structure commonly found in some underground military facilities. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGate_invincible.label: ancient armored gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateL.description: Armored gates, commonly found in some underground military facilities. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateL.label: ancient armored gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateS.description: Armored gates, commonly found in some underground military facilities. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateS.label: ancient armored gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateXS.description: Armored gates, commonly found in some underground military facilities. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateXS.label: ancient armored gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Arrow.label: arrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumA.description: The atrium of an ancient shopping mall, where light can penetrate from the ceiling, makes the entire mall bright. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumA.label: atrium
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumB.description: The atrium of an ancient shopping mall, where light can penetrate from the ceiling, makes the entire mall bright. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumB.label: atrium
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumC.description: The atrium of an ancient shopping mall, where light can penetrate from the ceiling, makes the entire mall bright. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumC.label: atrium
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumCorridorEast.description: The atrium of an ancient shopping mall, where light can penetrate from the ceiling, makes the entire mall bright. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumCorridorEast.label: atrium
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumCorridorNorth.description: The atrium of an ancient shopping mall, where light can penetrate from the ceiling, makes the entire mall bright. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumCorridorNorth.label: atrium
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AVendingMachine.description: Damaged ancient vending machines. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AVendingMachine.label: ancient vending machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BDAShelfA.description: There are still some goods on top that have not been crushed. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BDAShelfA.label: damaged large shelves
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BDAShelfB.description: There are still some goods on top that have not been crushed. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BDAShelfB.label: damaged large shelves
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BigCase.description: A large military supplies case. Maybe it has something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BigCase.label: large military supplies case
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BigCase_Open_Decoration.descrip: The opened case has nothing inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BigCase_Open_Decoration.label: big case
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Bishop.label: bishop
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedElevators.description: This escalator is blocked by debris and cannot pass through from here. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedElevators.label: blocked escalator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedElevatorsA.description: This escalator is blocked by debris and cannot pass through from here. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedElevatorsA.label: blocked escalator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedElevatorsD.description: This escalator is blocked by debris and cannot pass through from here. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedElevatorsD.label: blocked escalator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedElevatorsDA.description: This escalator is blocked by debris and cannot pass through from here. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedElevatorsDA.label: blocked escalator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedStairs.description: An inaccessible staircase piled with debris. Entirely inaccessible. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedStairs.label: blocked staircase
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedStairsD.description: An inaccessible staircase piled with debris. Entirely inaccessible. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedStairsD.label: blocked staircase
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedUndergroundGarageEntranc: An entrance to an underground parking lot. It is blocked off and entirely inaccessible. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BookCase.description: An old book case filled with books.\n\nNon-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BookCase.label: book case
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BriefCase_SalvagePoint.descript: A briefcase, probably containing something. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BriefCase_SalvagePoint.label: briefcase
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_brokedLogisticsTerminal.descrip: Damaged ancient logistics terminal, this is part of the ancient underground automatic logistics system. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_brokedLogisticsTerminal.label: broked logistics terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BTR82A.description: A damaged suspended IFV.\n\nNon-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BTR82A.label: ancient suspended IFV
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BurgerPaperBag.description: Paper bags from fried chicken restaurants. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BurgerPaperBag.label: burger paper bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BurgerPaperBox.description: Paper box from fried chicken restaurants. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BurgerPaperBox.label: burger paper box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BusRouteSignA.description: Ancient bus route signs. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BusRouteSignA.label: bus route sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BusRouteSignB.description: Ancient bus route signs. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BusRouteSignB.label: bus route sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BusStop.description: An ancient bus stop. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BusStop.label: bus stop
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_CardboardBox.description: A pile of disorganized cardboard boxes. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_CardboardBox.label: cardboard box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_CardboardBox_Impassable.descrip: Stacked densely with cardboard boxes, it's hard to tell what's inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_CardboardBox_Impassable.label: cardboard box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ClothesHanger.description: A set of hangers holding old pieces of clothing. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ClothesHanger.label: clothes rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ClothesHangerEmpty_Decoration.d: Clothing racks in clothing stores. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ComputerCase.description: An ancient computer case. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ComputerCase.label: computer case
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Cone.description: Triangular obstacle. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Cone.label: cone
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ConstructionSite.description: Hot work in progress. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ConstructionSite.label: construction site
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Crossroad.description: An old street sign indicating a crossroad. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Crossroad.label: crossroad sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Crown.label: crown
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_D2A.label: D2
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_DamagedEmptyShelves.description: Some dilapidated shelves. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_DamagedEmptyShelves.label: collapsed shelves
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_DiningChair.description: A comfortable and attractive chair. Can be used at tables, work stations, and elsewhere. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_DiningChair.label: dining chair
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_DK.label: DK
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_DoubleDeckRacks.description: The top layer of the large shelf is missing, and there are still some boxes on it. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_DoubleDeckRacks.label: large shelves
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_DownwardStairs.description: A staircase descends into the basement, where it is quite dark. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_DownwardStairs.label: ancient construction site staircase
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Effigy.description: Modern art sculptures inside ancient shopping malls. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Effigy.label: modern art sculpture
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_EmptyCans.description: A pile of beverage cans thrown on the ground that have been consumed by someone unknown. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_EmptyCans.label: empty cans
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_EmptyShelves_Decoration.descrip: Empty supermarket shelves. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_EmptyShelves_Decoration.label: empty shelves
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_Bunker.description: A staircase descends into the basement, where it is quite dark. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_Bunker.label: ancient staircase
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_CommercialStreet.descr: A stopped escalator, its destination unknown. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_CommercialStreet.label: ancient escalator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_Mall_A.description: An upward escalator that has ceased operation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_Mall_A.label: ancient escalator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_Mall_B.description: An upward escalator that has ceased operation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_Mall_B.label: ancient escalator

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_ReserveBunker.label: ancient staircase

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_Shelter.label: ancient staircase
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_Subway.description: A stopped escalator, its destination unknown. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_Subway.label: ancient escalator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Entrance_UndergroundGarage.desc: A large ramp descending to a dark underground. It seems wide enough for vehicles. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Exit_DoubleElevator.label: ancient escalator

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Exit_S.label: ancient escalator

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Exit_Staircase.label: ancient staircase
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Exit_Staircase_UndergroundGarag: A large ramp leading to above ground. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_FireTruck.label: ancient fire truck

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_FloorSignageD.label: floor signage
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Freezer.description: An old dessert refrigerator with unknown contents. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Freezer.label: freezer
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_FreightTrainCarriages.descripti: The carriages of ancient freight trains. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_FreightTrainCarriages.label: freight train carriages
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_HallSignage.description: Signs in the halls of ancient shopping malls. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_HG.label: HG

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Injection_StorageRacks.descript: Some shelves scattered with syringes and medical supplies. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Injection_StorageRacks.label: injection storage racks
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Knight.label: knight
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_LargeBackpack.description: An oversized military backpack that is already broken, but seems to contain something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_LargeBackpack.label: large backpack
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_LargeBackpack_Decoration.descri: an oversized military backpack that is already broken. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_LargeBackpack_Decoration.label: large backpack
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_LargeScreenTelevision.descripti: A super large ancient television capable of displaying 3D images, providing an entertainment experience akin to a 3D cinema. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_LargeScreenTelevision.label: large-screen television
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_LBT.description: A medical supplies backpack that is broken, but seems to contain something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_LBT.label: LBT
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_LBT_Decoration.description: The medical supplies backpack is broken. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_LBT_Decoration.label: LBT
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_MallBench.description: Badly rusted mall bench. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_MallBench.label: mall bench
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_MallColumn.description: The structural support columns of the shopping mall. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_MallColumn.label: mall column

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_MotorVehicleLane.label: motor vehicle lane sign

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_NoAccess.label: no access sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_NoGhoul.description: An old street sign indicating that ghouls are not permitted. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_NoGhoul.label: no ghouls permitted sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_NoParking.description: An old street sign indicating no parking. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_NoParking.label: no parking sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Notice.description: An old street sign warning of something. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Notice.label: notice sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_NoTurningAaround.description: An old street sign indicating a driver must not U-Turn. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_NoTurningAaround.label: no u-turn sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_OilDrum.description: A pile of haphazardly stacked iron drums. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_OilDrum.label: oil drum
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_OldBigCase.description: A damaged military supplies case. Maybe it has something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_OldWeaponCase.description: A long forgotten container. It seems to have something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_PostmanShoulderBag.description: A mail-carrying shoulder bag. While already broken, it seems to contain something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_PostmanShoulderBag.label: postman shoulder bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_PostmanShoulderBag_Decoration.d: The postman's small shoulder bag is already broken. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Queen.label: queen
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Refrigerator.description: A refrigerator containing various foods. Has long been powered off.\n\nNon-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Refrigerator.label: refrigerator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RefrigeratorEmpty.description: The refrigerator containing various foods has long been powered off. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RefrigeratorEmpty.label: refrigerator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RFC.label: RFC
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter.description: Rolling shutter doors, commonly found in warehouses. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter.label: rolling shutter door

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter_II.description: Rolling shutter doors, commonly found in warehouses. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter_II.label: rolling shutter door
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter_II_HP.descriptio: Rolling shutter doors, commonly found in warehouses. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter_II_HP.label: weathered rolling shutter door
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter_III.description: Rolling shutter doors, commonly found in warehouses. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter_III.label: rolling shutter door
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter_III_HP.descripti: Rolling shutter doors, commonly found in warehouses. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter_III_HP.label: weathered rolling shutter door
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter_NoHP.description: Rolling shutter doors, commonly found in warehouses. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RollingShutter_NoHP.label: rolling shutter door
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Rook.label: rook
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_RustyEmptyShelves_Decoration.de: Collapsed supermarket shelves. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Scav.description: A backpack made by a scavenger. It is broken, but it seems to hold something. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Scav.label: scav bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Scav_Decoration.description: The backpack made by the scavenger is broken. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Scav_Decoration.label: scav bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ShoppingMallGuideMap.descriptio: A guide map for guiding the internal zoning of the shopping mall. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ShoppingMallGuideMap.label: shopping mall guide map
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SICC_SalvagePoint.description: A small soft bag that seems to hold various items. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SICC_SalvagePoint.label: SICC
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SlideSign.description: Caution! Wet Floor. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SlideSign.label: slide sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SmallCase.description: A military supplies case. It seems to have something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SmallCase.label: small military case case
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SmallGenerator.description: Small scale fuel generator. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SmallGenerator.label: small fuel generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SmallShoppingGuideMapA.descript: Small shopping guide map. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SmallShoppingGuideMapA.label: shopping guide map
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SmallShoppingGuideMapB.descript: Small shopping guide map. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SmallShoppingGuideMapB.label: shopping guide map
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SmallShoppingGuideMapC.descript: Small shopping guide map. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SmallShoppingGuideMapC.label: shopping guide map
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Snack_StorageRacks.description: Some shelves with scattered packaged snacks. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Snack_StorageRacks.label: snack storage racks
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SpeedLimit40KPH.description: An old street sign depicting a speed limit of 40. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SpeedLimit40KPH.label: speed limit sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SpiritualFortressA.description: A giant ancient shopping mall iconic sculpture with some advertisements on it. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SpiritualFortressA.label: spiritual fortress
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SpiritualFortressB.description: A giant ancient shopping mall iconic sculpture with some advertisements on it. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SpiritualFortressB.label: spiritual fortress
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SpiritualFortressC.description: A giant ancient shopping mall iconic sculpture with some advertisements on it. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SpiritualFortressC.label: spiritual fortress
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SpiritualFortressD.description: A giant ancient shopping mall iconic sculpture with some advertisements on it. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SpiritualFortressD.label: spiritual fortress
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SportsBag.description: A sporting bag. It is already broken, but it seems to contain something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SportsBag.label: sports bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SportsBag_Decoration.descriptio: The sports bag is already broken. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SportsBag_Decoration.label: sports bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SteepAscent.description: An old street sign indicating an incoming steep ascent. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_SteepAscent.label: steep ascent sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_StorageRacks.description: Some shelves with scattered goods. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_StorageRacks.label: storage racks
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_THICC.description: Some large capacity storage boxes "thicc" are piled up on the ground. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_THICC.label: THICC
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ThreeLayerRacks.description: A large shelf cluttered with boxes. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ThreeLayerRacks.label: large shelves
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_TousledStorageRacks.description: Some shelves with scattered goods. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_TousledStorageRacks.label: miscellaneous storage racks
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Trader.description: Ancient logistics terminal, this is part of the ancient underground automatic logistics system. You can purchase goods from ancient material storage stations through the interactive panel, which constitutes a logistics system within an ancient city. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Trader.label: ancient logistics terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_TravelBag.description: An oversized and eye-catching purple travel bag. It is already broken, but seems to contain something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_TravelBag.label: travel bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_TravelBag_Decoration.descriptio: The oversized and eye-catching purple travel bag is already broken. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_TravelBag_Decoration.label: travel bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_TurnAround.description: An old street sign indicating a u-turn. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_TurnAround.label: u-turn sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_VC.label: VC
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_VegetableShelf.description: A long forgotten shelf containing vegetables.\n\nNon-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_VegetableShelf.label: vegetable shelf
Empty vegetable shelves. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_VendingMachine.description: A damaged ancient vending machine.\n\nNon-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_VendingMachine.label: vending machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForBug.description: An old street sign warning about hostile insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForBug.label: watch for insects sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForGorehulk.description: An old street sign depicting an ominous warning. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForGorehulk.label: watch for gorehulk sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForMachine.description: An old street sign warning against hostile mechanoids. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForMachine.label: watch for mechanoid sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForMetalhorror.description: An old street sign depicting an ominous warning. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForMetalhorror.label: watch for metalhorror sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForNoctol.description: An old street sign depicting an ominous warning Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForNoctol.label: watch for noctol sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WeaponCase.description: A well-worn container. It seems to have something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WeaponCase.label: weapon case
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WeaponCaseLow.description: A weapon case that has been pried open. It seems to have something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WeaponCaseLow.label: opened weapon case
